evidence.observation: Phoneme /b/ articulation misaligned with audio onset by approximately one frame (~80 ms) at frame 7 of 25 sampled frames
Jawline edge shows soft-edge blending artifact inconsistent with skin texture continuity; characteristic of face-swap boundary mask
Cast shadow on right cheek does not update consistently with subtle head rotation between frames 17→19; lighting model decoupled from geometry
Two micro-blinks within ~0.4 s window — non-physiological cadence; natural blink rate is 12-15 per minute
Subtle background flicker near left ear suggests face mask boundary leakage during compositing

summary: Multiple high-severity synthesis artifacts detected: lip-sync drift at frame 7, jaw-edge blending at frame 14, and non-physiological blink cadence at frame 22. The combination is consistent with a face-swap or talking-head deepfake. Confidence is high (94%).
